description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker, predominantly white with gray and black accents, and features a mid-top design for ankle support. The shoe displays a prominent Nike Swoosh logo in red on the lateral side and a triangular logo on the heel and tongue, suggesting a signature or collaboration model. The upper is constructed from a combination of mesh and synthetic materials, with perforations for breathability and reinforced overlays for durability. The lacing system is standard criss-cross, and the tongue is padded for comfort. The outsole appears to be made of rubber, with a visible tread pattern for traction, and the midsole is slightly elevated for cushioning. Signs of dirt and creasing indicate the shoe is lightly used but remains structurally intact.
description: A white and gray mid-top athletic sneaker with red Nike and triangular logos, standard lacing, and visible signs of light use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red triangular logo on the heel, black Nike Swoosh, and layered upper materials.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the standard criss-cross lacing, padded tongue with triangular logo, and toe box with mesh and synthetic overlays.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the red Nike Swoosh, perforated midfoot panel, and overall shoe profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel structure, back of the collar, and the triangular logo on the heel counter.
attribute_logo: Red Nike Swoosh on the lateral side, red triangular logo on the heel and tongue
